title: BetterVanilla modpack
description: mod pack for playing on vanilla servers or alone with a lot of client mods
body:
# !WARNING!

**Quilt version 0.20.0–beta.5**

**Minecraft version 1.20.1**

# BetterVanilla



mod pack for playing on vanilla servers or alone with a lot of client mods 

Mods are collected on the latest version 1.20.1 for a more enjoyable pastime in the game.

Mods are only client-side and do not complement the world, the game on the server will become more pleasant and convenient, and the atmosphere will become more pleasant!

# What modpack adds?

This mod pack will add [more ambient](https://youtu.be/ZeotslU0M8I) and a lot of sounds that complement the world very much, so that it's just more pleasant to play and be in the game. 

Shaders and resource packs add to the visual component of the game where many textures will run even on a fairly old PC at 60 fps.

As I said above, there is the best optimization in 2023, which consistently produces from 200 to 400 fps.

There are auxiliary mods that help a lot in different situations, there are also prohibited mods that are not allowed on some servers, but this is easily disabled in the [launcher from modrinth](https://modrinth.com/app).

 I really hope you will download and follow the updates. GLHF <3
